visual_description: A person is engulfed in flames, their body contorted in agony as they fall to the ground. The scene shifts to a dimly lit, red-hued alley where a man in a dark coat aims a gun, then runs forward. Another man in a red jacket and patterned hat appears, also holding a gun and shouting with an open mouth.
audio_description: A loud, distorted musical sting plays, followed by a scream and a crashing sound.
